subject: Need Q2 invoice copy
incoming_email: Can you share invoice INV-4901 from our Q2 renewal? Our accountant needs it this afternoon.
gold_reply:
Hi,

Yes, I can help with that. I'll send invoice INV-4901 to finance@oaklanepartners.com shortly. If your accountant needs it copied elsewhere, just send the additional address.

Best,
Support

subject: Appreciate the help
incoming_email: Thanks again for sorting this out so quickly.

subject: Reset link invalid
incoming_email: Every password reset link I receive says 'invalid token' as soon as I open it. What should I do next?
thread_history: Customer is the only admin on a 9-seat workspace.
gold_reply:
Hi,

Sorry you're running into that. I've triggered a fresh reset email for you now, and it should work for the next 15 minutes. If the error still appears, reply with a screenshot and we'll escalate the login issue immediately.

Best,
Support

subject: Refund request and legal threat
incoming_email: Refund this immediately or our legal counsel will contact you tomorrow.
thread_history: Customer is upset about a recent renewal.
gold_reply:
Hi,

I'm sorry this situation has been so frustrating. I'm escalating your request to a senior billing specialist right away so they can review the account and respond with priority. You should hear from the appropriate team shortly.

Best,
Support

subject: Need more seats for onboarding
incoming_email: How do I add 8 seats before our team goes live on Wednesday?
gold_reply:
Hi,

You can add seats from Settings > Billing > Manage Seats. If you'd like us to help before Wednesday, just confirm the final seat count and billing contact and we'll make sure the change is lined up in time.

Best,
Support

subject: Maintenance reminder
incoming_email: FYI: scheduled maintenance starts tonight at 11 PM Eastern. No action needed on your side.

subject: Need PDF export help
incoming_email: Where can I export a PDF of our conversation history for the last 30 days?
gold_reply:
Hi,

You can create that export from Reports > Exports by selecting the conversation history report, setting the date range to the last 30 days, and choosing PDF as the format. If you don't see the export option, reply with your role and we'll help check access.

Best,
Support

subject: Urgent account lock-down request
incoming_email: We detected suspicious logins from outside the country and need help securing the account now.
thread_history: Enterprise workspace with multiple admin users.
gold_reply:
Hi,

Thanks for alerting us immediately. I'm escalating this to our security response team now so they can help secure the account and investigate the login activity as quickly as possible. Please watch for a priority follow-up shortly.

Best,
Support

subject: Out until Monday
incoming_email: Auto-reply: I'm traveling and won't have email access until Monday morning.

subject: Compare Pro vs Enterprise
incoming_email: What's included in Enterprise that isn't already in Pro?
thread_history: Customer is evaluating an upgrade for a 60-person team.
gold_reply:
Hi,

Enterprise includes capabilities like advanced security controls, richer admin tooling, and higher-touch support beyond the core Pro features. If you'd like, I can also share a side-by-side comparison based on your 60-person rollout so you can see which plan fits best.

Best,
Support

subject: Bounce errors for one domain
incoming_email: Emails to all contacts at northgatefoods.com are bouncing today. Can you help us figure out why?
thread_history: Other customer domains are sending normally.
gold_reply:
Hi,

Certainly. Please send us one complete bounce message so we can confirm the rejection reason. In the meantime, verify the recipient addresses and let us know whether any sending-domain settings changed today so we can guide the next troubleshooting step.

Best,
Support

subject: Need to remove teammate access
incoming_email: A team member left the company yesterday. How do we remove them without losing their open conversations?
gold_reply:
Hi,

You can deactivate the teammate from Settings > Team, and the product will prompt you to reassign their open conversations before the change is completed. If you want, I can also outline the reassignment steps so the handoff goes smoothly.

Best,
Support
